title: Mac N Cheese!
description: Adds Mac N Cheese and that's all!
body:
A friend once asked me to make a mod that only adds Mac N Cheese.

So I did!

**How do I make Mac N Cheese?**

  You craft Mac N Cheese using a bowl, 2 wheat, and 1 milk bucket.

**Why do I want Mac N Cheese anyway?**

  Mac N Cheese fills a niche that the base game does not. A cheap food that gives lots of saturation! But to keep this balanced, Mac N Cheese does not fill many hunger points.

This mod works well with my Pop Tart mod!
